text: devar-yehva ׀ asher haya el-mikha hamorasheti bimey yovtam achaz yechizeqiya malekhey yehuda asher-chaza 'al-shomerovn virushalaim
shime'u 'amim kulam haqeshivi erets umeloah vihi adonay yehvi bakhem le'ed adonay meheykhal qadeshov
ki-hine yehva yotse mimeqovmov veyarad vedarakh 'al bamovtey kh bamotey q arets
venamasu heharim tachetayv veha'amaqim yitebaqa'u kadovnag mipeney haesh kemayim mugarim bemovrad
befesha' ya'aqov kal-zot uvechatovt beyt yiserael mi-fesha' ya'aqov halov shomerovn umi bamovt yehuda halov yerushalaim
vesameti shomerovn le'i hasade lemata'ey kharem vehigareti lagay avaneyha visodeyha agale
vekhal-pesileyha yukatu vekhal-etenaneyha yisarefu vaesh vekhal-'atsabeyha asim shemama ki meetenan zovna qibatsa ve'ad-etenan zovna yashuvu
'al-zot esepeda veeylila eylekha shilal kh shovlal q ve'arovm e'ese miseped katanim veevel kivenovt ya'ana
ki anusha makovteyha ki-vaa 'ad-yehuda naga' 'ad-sha'ar 'ami 'ad-yerushalaim
begat al-tagidu bakhov al-tiveku beveyt le'afera 'afar hitepalasheti kh hitepalashi q
'iveri lakhem yovshevet shafir 'ereyah-voshet lo yatsea yovshevet tsaanan misepad beyt haetsel yiqach mikem 'emedatov
ki-chala letovv yovshevet marovt ki-yarad ra' meet yehva lesha'ar yerushalaim
retom hamerekava larekhesh yovshevet lakhish reshit chatat hi levat-tsiyovn ki-vakh nimetseu pishe'ey yiserael
lakhen titeni shiluchim 'al movreshet gat batey akheziv leakhezav lemalekhey yiserael
'od hayoresh avi lakh yovshevet maresha 'ad-'adulam yavov kevovd yiserael
qarechi vagozi 'al-beney ta'anugayikh harechivi qarechatekh kanesher ki galu mimekh s
hovy choshevey-aven ufo'aley ra' 'al-mishekevovtam beovr haboqer ya'asuha ki yesh-leel yadam
vechamedu sadovt vegazalu uvatim venasau ve'ashequ gever uveytov veish venachalatov f
lakhen ko amar yehva hineni choshev 'al-hamishepacha hazot ra'a asher lo-tamishu misham tsaveroteykhem velo telekhu rovma ki 'et ra'a hi
bayovm hahu yisa 'aleykhem mashal venaha nehi niheya amar shadovd neshadunu cheleq 'ami yamir eykh yamish li leshovvev sadeynu yechaleq
lakhen lo-yiheye lekha mashelikh chevel begovral biqehal yehva
al-tatifu yatifun lo-yatifu laele lo yisag kelimovt
heamur beyt-ya'aqov haqatsar rucha yehva im-ele ma'alalayv halov devaray yeytivu 'im hayashar hovlekh
veetemul 'ami leovyev yeqovmem mimul salema eder tafeshitun me'overim betach shuvey milechama
neshey 'ami tegareshun mibeyt ta'anugeyha me'al 'olaleyha tiqechu hadari le'ovlam
qumu ulekhu ki lo-zot hamenucha ba'avur tamea techabel vechevel nimerats
lu-ish holekh rucha vasheqer kizev atif lekha layayin velashekhar vehaya matif ha'am haze
asof eesof ya'aqov kulakh qabets aqabets sheerit yiserael yachad asimenu ketson batsera ke'eder betovkh hadaverov tehimena meadam
'ala haporets lifeneyhem paretsu vaya'avoru sha'ar vayetseu vov vaya'avor malekam lifeneyhem vayhva berosham f
vaomar shime'u-na rashey ya'aqov uqetsiney beyt yiserael halov lakhem lada'at et-hamishepat
soneey tovv veohavey ra'a kh ra' q gozeley 'ovram me'aleyhem usheeram me'al 'atsemovtam
vaasher akhelu sheer 'ami ve'ovram me'aleyhem hifeshitu veet-'atsemoteyhem pitsechu ufaresu kaasher basir ukhevasar betovkh qalachat
az yize'aqu el-yehva velo ya'ane ovtam veyaseter panayv mehem ba'et hahi kaasher here'u ma'aleleyhem f
ko amar yehva 'al-haneviim hamate'im et-'ami hanoshekhim beshineyhem veqareu shalovm vaasher lo-yiten 'al-pihem veqideshu 'alayv milechama
lakhen layela lakhem mechazovn vechashekha lakhem miqesom uvaa hashemesh 'al-haneviim veqadar 'aleyhem hayovm
uvoshu hachozim vechaferu haqosemim ve'atu 'al-safam kulam ki eyn ma'ane elohim
veulam anokhi maleti khocha et-rucha yehva umishepat ugevura lehagid leya'aqov pishe'ov uleyiserael chatatov s
shime'u-na zot rashey beyt ya'aqov uqetsiney beyt yiserael hamata'avim mishepat veet kal-hayeshara ye'aqeshu
bone tsiyovn bedamim virushalaim be'avela
rasheyha ׀ beshochad yishepotu vekhohaneyha bimechir yovru unevieyha bekhesef yiqesomu ve'al-yehva yisha'enu lemor halov yehva beqirebenu lo-tavov 'aleynu ra'a
lakhen bigelalekhem tsiyovn sade techaresh virushalaim 'iyin tiheye vehar habayit levamovt ya'ar f
vehaya ׀ beacharit hayamim yiheye har beyt-yehva nakhovn berosh heharim venisa hu migeva'ovt venaharu 'alayv 'amim ׃
vehalekhu govyim rabim veameru lekhu ׀ vena'ale el-har-yehva veel-beyt elohey ya'aqov veyovrenu miderakhayv venelekha beorechotayv ki mitsiyovn tetse tovra udevar-yehva mirushalaim
veshafat beyn 'amim rabim vehovkhicha legovyim 'atsumim 'ad-rachovq vekhitetu charevoteyhem leitim vachanitoteyhem lemazemerovt lo-yiseu govy el-govy cherev velo-yilemedun 'ovd milechama
veyashevu ish tachat gafenov vetachat teenatov veeyn macharid ki-fi yehva tsevaovt diber
ki kal-ha'amim yelekhu ish beshem elohayv vaanachenu nelekh beshem-yehva eloheynu le'ovlam va'ed f
bayovm hahu neum-yehva osefa hatsole'a vehanidacha aqabetsa vaasher hare'oti
vesameti et-hatsole'a lisheerit vehanahalaa legovy 'atsum umalakh yehva 'aleyhem behar tsiyovn me'ata ve'ad-'ovlam f
veata migedal-'eder 'ofel bat-tsiyovn 'adeykha tete uvaa hamemeshala harishona mamelekhet levat-yerushalaim
'ata lama tari'i re'a hamelekh eyn-bakh im-yov'atsekh avad ki-hecheziqekh chil kayovleda
chuli vagochi bat-tsiyovn kayovleda ki-'ata tetsei miqireya veshakhanet basade uvat 'ad-bavel sham tinatseli m yigealekh yehva mikaf oyevayikh
ve'ata neesefu 'alayikh govyim rabim haomerim techenaf vetachaz betsiyovn 'eyneynu
vehema lo yade'u macheshevovt yehva velo hevinu 'atsatov ki qibetsam ke'amir gorena
qumi vadovshi vat-tsiyovn ki-qarenekh asim barezel ufaresotayikh asim nechusha vahadiqovt 'amim rabim vehacharameti layhva bitse'am vecheylam laadovn kal-haarets
'ata titegodedi vat-gedud matsovr sam 'aleynu bashevet yaku 'al-halechi et shofet yiserael s
veata beyt-lechem eferata tsa'ir liheyovt bealefey yehuda mimekha li yetse liheyovt movshel beyiserael umovtsaotayv miqedem mimey 'ovlam
lakhen yitenem 'ad-'et yovleda yalada veyeter echayv yeshuvun 'al-beney yiserael
ve'amad vera'a be'oz yehva bigeovn shem yehva elohayv veyashavu ki-'ata yigedal 'ad-afesey-arets
vehaya ze shalovm ashur ׀ ki-yavov vearetsenu vekhi yiderokh bearemenoteynu vahaqemonu 'alayv shive'a ro'im ushemona nesikhey adam
vera'u et-erets ashur bacherev veet-erets nimerod bifetacheyha vehitsil meashur ki-yavov vearetsenu vekhi yiderokh bigevulenu s
vehaya ׀ sheerit ya'aqov beqerev 'amim rabim ketal meet yehva kirevivim 'aley-'esev asher lo-yeqave leish velo yeyachel liveney adam
vehaya sheerit ya'aqov bagovyim beqerev 'amim rabim keareye bevahamovt ya'ar kikhefir be'ederey-tson asher im 'avar veramas vetaraf veeyn matsil
tarom yadekha 'al-tsareykha vekhal-oyeveykha yikaretu f
vehaya vayovm-hahu neum-yehva vehikherati suseykha miqirebekha vehaavadeti marekevoteykha
vehikherati 'arey aretsekha veharaseti kal-mivetsareykha
vehikherati kheshafim miyadekha ume'ovnenim lo yiheyu-lakh
vehikherati fesileykha umatsevovteykha miqirebekha velo-tishetachave 'ovd lema'ase yadeykha
venatasheti asheyreykha miqirebekha vehishemadeti 'areykha
ve'asiti beaf uvechema naqam et-hagovyim asher lo shame'u s
shime'u-na et asher-yehva omer qum riv et-heharim vetishema'ena hageva'ovt qovlekha
shime'u harim et-riv yehva vehaetanim mosedey arets ki riv layhva 'im-'amov ve'im-yiserael yitevakach
'ami meh-'asiti lekha uma heleetikha 'ane vi
ki he'elitikha meerets mitserayim umibeyt 'avadim peditikha vaeshelach lefaneykha et-moshe aharon umireyam
'ami zekhar-na mah-ya'ats balaq melekh movav umeh-'ana otov bile'am ben-be'ovr min-hashitim 'ad-hagilegal lema'an da'at tsideqovt yehva
bama aqadem yehva ikaf lelohey marovm haaqademenu ve'ovlovt ba'agalim beney shana
hayiretse yehva bealefey eylim berivevovt nachaley-shamen haeten bekhovri pishe'i peri viteni chatat nafeshi
higid lekha adam mah-tovv umah-yehva dovresh mimekha ki im-'asovt mishepat veahavat chesed vehatsene'a lekhet 'im-eloheykha f
qovl yehva la'ir yiqera vetushiya yiree shemekha shime'u mate umi ye'adah
'ovd haish beyt rasha' otserovt resha' veeyfat razovn ze'uma
haezeke bemozeney resha' uvekhis aveney mirema
asher 'ashireyha maleu chamas veyosheveyha diberu-shaqer uleshovnam remiya befihem
vegam-ani hecheleyti hakovtekha hashemem 'al-chatotekha
ata tokhal velo tiseba' veyeshechakha beqirebekha vetaseg velo tafelit vaasher tefalet lacherev eten
ata tizera' velo tiqetsovr ata tiderokhe-zayit velo-tasukh shemen vetirovsh velo tisheteh-yayin
veyishetamer chuqovt 'ameri vekhol ma'ase veyt-acheav vatelekhu bemo'atsovtam lema'an titi otekha leshama veyosheveyha lishereqa vecherepat 'ami tisau f
alelay li ki hayiti keasepey-qayits ke'olelot batsir eyn-eshekovl leekhovl bikura iveta nafeshi
avad chasid min-haarets veyashar baadam ayin kulam ledamim yeerovu ish et-achihu yatsudu cherem
'al-hara' kapayim leheytiv hasar shoel vehashofet bashilum vehagadovl dover havat nafeshov hu vaye'abetuha
tovvam kechedeq yashar mimesukha yovm metsapeykha pequdatekha vaa 'ata tiheye mevukhatam
al-taaminu vere'a al-tivetechu bealuf mishokhevet cheyqekha shemor pitechey-fikha
ki-ven menabel av bat qama veimah kala bachamotah oyevey ish aneshey veytov
vaani bayhva atsape ovchila lelohey yishe'i yishema'eni elohay
al-tisemechi oyaveti li ki nafaleti qameti ki-eshev bachoshekh yehva ovr li s
za'af yehva esa ki chatati lov 'ad asher yariv rivi ve'asa mishepati yovtsieni laovr eree betsideqatov
vetere oyaveti utekhaseha vusha haomera elay ayov yehva elohayikh 'eynay tireeyna bah 'ata tiheye lemiremas ketit chutsovt
yovm livenovt gederayikh yovm hahu yirechaq-choq
yovm hu ve'adeykha yavov lemini ashur ve'arey matsovr ulemini matsovr ve'ad-nahar veyam miyam vehar hahar
vehayeta haarets lishemama 'al-yosheveyha miperi ma'aleleyhem s
re'e 'amekha veshivetekha tson nachalatekha shokheni levadad ya'ar betovkh karemel yire'u vashan vegile'ad kimey 'ovlam
kimey tsetekha meerets mitserayim areenu nifelaovt
yireu govyim veyevoshu mikol gevuratam yasimu yad 'al-pe azeneyhem techerashena
yelachakhu 'afar kanachash kezochaley erets yiregezu mimisegeroteyhem el-yehva eloheynu yifechadu veyireu mimeka
mi-el kamovkha nose 'aon ve'over 'al-pesha' lisheerit nachalatov lo-hecheziq la'ad apov ki-chafets chesed hu
yashuv yerachamenu yikhebosh 'aonoteynu vetashelikh bimetsulovt yam kal-chatovtam
titen emet leya'aqov chesed leaveraham asher-nisheba'eta laavoteynu mimey qedem
